name: Spicy Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, ground red chiles, oregano, and pepper.
2. Rub the mixture over the pork roast.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C).
5. Place the pork, with the fat side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Insert a meat thermometer so that the tip is in the thickest part of the pork, without resting in the fat.
7. Roast until the thermometer registers 170 degrees F (77 degrees C), about 2 hours.
